event: Interior of the Pond House at Saltanat Abad Palace
description: A richly detailed interior of a Persian palace bathhouse or reception hall. The space features elaborate muqarnas (honeycomb) vaulting in the ceiling, intricate stained glass windows, and walls covered with geometric and floral tile patterns. At the center, a small octagonal pool or fountain sits on the marble floor. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, creating a jewel-box effect. The color palette is dominated by rich golds, blues, greens, and warm ambient light.

_meta.title: The Pond House Of Saltanat Abad Palace
